response.step_by_step_log:
1. I watched the video and identified the main song performance, "Prisoner", credited to Hololive English -Advent-. The lyrics appear on-screen. 
2. I performed a web search using the query `"Prisoner" Hololive English Advent lyrics` to confirm the song details and get the full, accurate text of the lyrics.
3. The song is in English, so I used the same text for both original and translated lyrics.
4. I created the JSON structure, breaking the video into three main scenes: the intro/dialogue, the song performance, and the closing announcement sequence.
response.global_summary: The video features a promotional dance performance of the song "Prisoner" by the Hololive English -Advent- group, followed by a series of merchandise announcements for their 2nd Anniversary.

scenes.description: Introductory dialogue and scene setup for the dance performance.
The Hololive English -Advent- members perform a choreographed dance to the song 'Prisoner'. Song title and credit info appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Locked away where nightmares keep you awake,
You'll be safe within my crushing embrace.
You're all mine, all mine (You'll never escape),
You're all mine, all mine...

Wayward soul, I'll wrap you up in darkness,
That consumes you whole,
Hold you in my labyrinth of walls.
(Lost in the depths that swallow you,
Where just your shadows follow you)

Always churning in the deep,
I won't let you sleep.
You don't need your dreams now,
That you belong to me.
Throw them all away,
You're too frail to be free.

You will always be my lovely prisoner...
(Are you shaking?) My eyes will find you,
Let me clutch you tightly (You can only be mine),
Poor little prisoner...
(Are you breaking?) My chains will bind you here forever,
Stay here for all time...

(In tenebris, in frigore, in carcere)
(In tenebris, in frigore, in carcere)

Close your eyes, go deeper in the emptiness,
That plagues your mind,
Let my dark envelop your light.
I will keep you safe and sound,
Hear the blissful silence all around.
I'll drag you down below,
Never let you go.

Everything you've been,
The transgressions of your past.
Throw them all away,
Let me hold you at last...

You will always be my lovely prisoner...
(Are you shaking?) My eyes will find you,
Let me clutch you tightly (You can only be mine),
Poor little prisoner...
(Are you breaking?) My chains will bind you here forever,
Stay here for all time...

(In tenebris, in frigore, in carcere)
(In tenebris, in frigore, in carcere)

I can hear your plea,
Reaching desperately,
But I'll never, ever set you free.
Stay with me.

You will always be my lovely prisoner...
(Are you shaking?) My eyes will find you,
Let me clutch you tightly (You can only be mine),
Poor little prisoner...
(Are you breaking?) My chains will bind you here forever,
Stay here for all time...

(In tenebris, in frigore, in carcere)
(In tenebris, in frigore, in carcere)

scenes.description: Closing dialogue and merchandise announcements for the 2nd Anniversary celebration.
